item.title: Avoid Generic Resume Phrases 🛑 • Use: “I increased sales by 20% through targeted campaigns.” • Highlight specific tools you used, like Excel or Python. • Show measurable results, not just duties. • Tailor each resume to the job description. • Avoid buzzwords; focus on concrete skills. Are your resume achievements specific enough to stand out in an ATS scan? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Avoid Generic Resume Phrases 🛑 • Use: “I increased sales by 20% through targeted campaigns.” • Highlight specific tools you used, like Excel or Python. • Show measurable results, not just duties. • Tailor each resume to the job description. • Avoid buzzwords; focus on concrete skills. Are your resume achievements specific enough to stand out in an ATS scan? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
